product.name: Colgate Total Toothpaste - Fresh Mint

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

metaData.Key Information:
The New Colgate Gum Care toothpaste with Active Prevention Plus, is 3x more effective at fighting a root cause* of top oral issues such as Gum Problems, Plaque, Tartar, Sensitivity, Bad Breath, and Cavities. Its Powerful, Patented, Preventative Technology is clinically proven to provide 24 hours antibacterial action**, that provides long lasting benefits against bacteria to help prevent 8 oral care problems before they start.

Clinically proven to reduce gum bleeding, swelling and redness#, our proprietary formula helps protect gums against plaque and prevents early signs of gum problems. This toothpaste is formulated with gentle foam that is suited to those prone to gum concerns. 100% of users in clinical study had healthier gums.^

Use Colgate Total toothpaste twice daily to actively prevent against oral care problems before they start.

* by reducing plaque vs regular toothpaste after 3 months of twice daily use. Plaque is the root cause of cavity, gum problems, bad breath
** 2x daily brushing with 4 weeks continued use
***vs potassium based toothpaste after 1 week of continuous use
^by reducing plaque, clinical study by Deyu Hu, July 20, 2021
# by reducing plaque build up

metaData.Key Information:
Get the freedom to forget about tooth sensitivity with Colgate Sensitive Pro-Relief Whitening Toothpaste. With the exclusive Pro-Argin formula, it provides instant* and lasting** relief by plugging the channels to block tooth sensitivity. Its low abrasive formula gently and effectively removes stains***, helping restore the natural whiteness of your teeth.

*For instant relief; apply directly to the sensitive tooth with fingertip; and massage gently for 60 seconds; one a week or less frequently
**For lasting relief; apply to a gentle toothbrush making sure to brush all sensitive areas of the teeth. Brush twice daily.
***Extrinsic stains; when brushing; with regular usage
metaData.SAP Product Name: COLGATE SENSITIVE PRO RELIEF WHITENING TOOTHPASTE 3S 110G 1S
